name: Tabs
description: Tabbed navigation — capsule (detached) or chrome (attached). Built on Base UI Tabs.

mode.description: Spatial mode — capsule (detached, free-floating bar) or chrome (attached, merges into content edge)

position.description: Where the tab list sits relative to content

indicator.description: Show dot pagination indicator alongside tab list

showInactiveLabels.description: Render inactive tab labels alongside icons (default: icon-only when inactive)

examples.name: Capsule tabs (default — detached)
examples.code:
<Tabs defaultValue="design">
  <Tabs.List>
    <Tabs.Trigger value="design" icon={<PencilIcon />}>Design</Tabs.Trigger>
    <Tabs.Trigger value="code" icon={<CodeIcon />}>Code</Tabs.Trigger>
  </Tabs.List>
  <Tabs.Content value="design">Design panel</Tabs.Content>
  <Tabs.Content value="code">Code panel</Tabs.Content>
</Tabs>

examples.name: Chrome tabs (attached — merges into content)
examples.code:
<Tabs defaultValue="home" mode="chrome">
  <Tabs.List>
    <Tabs.Trigger value="home" icon={<HomeIcon />}>Home</Tabs.Trigger>
    <Tabs.Trigger value="settings" icon={<GearIcon />}>Settings</Tabs.Trigger>
  </Tabs.List>
  <Tabs.Content value="home">Home content</Tabs.Content>
  <Tabs.Content value="settings">Settings content</Tabs.Content>
</Tabs>

examples.name: Bottom tabs with dot indicator
examples.code:
<Tabs defaultValue="feed" position="bottom" indicator="dot">
  <Tabs.Content value="feed">Feed</Tabs.Content>
  <Tabs.Content value="search">Search</Tabs.Content>
  <Tabs.List>
    <Tabs.Trigger value="feed">Feed</Tabs.Trigger>
    <Tabs.Trigger value="search">Search</Tabs.Trigger>
  </Tabs.List>
</Tabs>
